  • Interfaces
  • StudyOverrides

Interface: StudyOverrides

Charting Library.StudyOverrides

Indicator overrides. See Indicator Overrides.

Use these properties to specify default indicator style via ChartingLibraryWidgetOptions.studies_overrides and IChartingLibraryWidget.applyStudiesOverrides.

Indexableâ

âª [key: string]: StudyOverrideValueType

Propertiesâ

52 week high/low.high sourceâ

â¢ 52 week high/low.high source: string

  • Default value: close
  • Input type: text
  • Options: ["close","high"]

52 week high/low.low sourceâ

â¢ 52 week high/low.low source: string

  • Default value: close
  • Input type: text
  • Options: ["close","low"]

accelerator oscillator.plot.colorâ

â¢ accelerator oscillator.plot.color: string

Default value: #000080

accelerator oscillator.plot.displayâ

â¢ accelerator oscillator.plot.display: number

Default value: 15

accelerator oscillator.plot.linestyleâ

â¢ accelerator oscillator.plot.linestyle: number

Default value: 0

accelerator oscillator.plot.linewidthâ

â¢ accelerator oscillator.plot.linewidth: number

Default value: 1

accelerator oscillator.plot.plottypeâ

â¢ accelerator oscillator.plot.plottype: LineStudyPlotStyleName

Default value: histogram

accelerator oscillator.plot.trackpriceâ

â¢ accelerator oscillator.plot.trackprice: boolean

Default value: false

accelerator oscillator.plot.transparencyâ

â¢ accelerator oscillator.plot.transparency: number

Default value: 0

accumulation/distribution.plot.colorâ

â¢ accumulation/distribution.plot.color: string

Default value: #2196F3

accumulation/distribution.plot.displayâ

â¢ accumulation/distribution.plot.display: number

Default value: 15

accumulation/distribution.plot.linestyleâ

â¢ accumulation/distribution.plot.linestyle: number

Default value: 0

accumulation/distribution.plot.linewidthâ

â¢ accumulation/distribution.plot.linewidth: number

Default value: 1

accumulation/distribution.plot.plottypeâ

â¢ accumulation/distribution.plot.plottype: LineStudyPlotStyleName

Default value: line

accumulation/distribution.plot.trackpriceâ

â¢ accumulation/distribution.plot.trackprice: boolean

Default value: false

accumulation/distribution.plot.transparencyâ

â¢ accumulation/distribution.plot.transparency: number

Default value: 0

accumulative swing index.asi.colorâ

â¢ accumulative swing index.asi.color: string

Default value: #2196F3

accumulative swing index.asi.displayâ

â¢ accumulative swing index.asi.display: number

Default value: 15

accumulative swing index.asi.linestyleâ

â¢ accumulative swing index.asi.linestyle: number

Default value: 0

accumulative swing index.asi.linewidthâ

â¢ accumulative swing index.asi.linewidth: number

Default value: 1

accumulative swing index.asi.plottypeâ

â¢ accumulative swing index.asi.plottype: LineStudyPlotStyleName

Default value: line

accumulative swing index.asi.trackpriceâ

â¢ accumulative swing index.asi.trackprice: boolean

Default value: false

accumulative swing index.asi.transparencyâ

â¢ accumulative swing index.asi.transparency: number

Default value: 0

accumulative swing index.limit move valueâ

â¢ accumulative swing index.limit move value: number

  • Default value: 10
  • Input type: float
  • Min: 0.1
  • Max: 100000

advance/decline.lengthâ

â¢ advance/decline.length: number
